allow: Bash(find D:/recomp/ps3 -type f -not -path '*/.claude/*' -not -path '*/.git/*' | wc -l && echo "---" && find D:/recomp/ps3 -type f -not -path '*/.claude/*' -not -path '*/.git/*' -name '*.c' -o -name '*.h' | wc -l && echo "---" && find D:/recomp/ps3 -type f -not -path '*/.claude/*' -not -path '*/.git/*' | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
